items.title: Learning rate in the update rule
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  theta["parameters theta"] --> grad["compute gradient nabla L"]
  grad --> scale["multiply by learning rate eta"]
  scale --> step["subtract from theta"]
  step --> thetaNew["updated theta"]
items.caption: η converts the gradient direction into a parameter update: θ ← θ − η∇L.

items.title: Step size on a 1D loss bowl
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  small["eta too small: tiny steps toward minimum"]
  good["eta tuned: steady progress into valley"]
  large["eta too large: overshoot and oscillate"]
  small --> good
  good --> large
items.caption: Qualitative behavior on a convex bowl: η controls whether iterates converge smoothly, quickly, or diverge.
